detailedDescription:
32GB DDR5 dual-channel kit.
The go-to config for high-end gaming rigs and creative workstations on DDR5.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 32GB
Generation: DDR5
Bandwidth: Up to 51.2 GB/s per channel (DDR5-6400)
Voltage: 1.1V (1.35V+ for XMP/EXPO OC)
Slots: 2 x 16GB (dual-channel)
On-Die ECC: Yes
XMP 3.0 / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1700, AM5
